inputs.titre: Approbation du premier vaccin contre le cancer (Gardasil)

reason: The image depicts a modern clinical setting. While the general ambiance aligns with the described event, there are elements that clash with the 2006 setting. The lighting fixtures in the ceiling appear to be modern LED panel lights, which are unlikely to have been common in a standard clinic in 2006. The design of the examination table and the wheeled cart supporting medical supplies also seem more contemporary. The material of the woman's jacket is also more modern. Overall, the image feels slightly too modern in its aesthetic to accurately depict a clinic in 2006.
